title: How Bending Spoons built a $23bn tech empire from struggling brands
summary: Bending Spoons' Nasdaq listing caps more than a decade of acquisitions that turned the Italian startup into a $23 billion global internet company, according to the Financial Times. The story illustrates how an aggressive, serial M&A roll-up strategy can extract outsized value from distressed and underperforming brands.

title: Wall Street banks recover in China amid trading boom
summary: The China securities units of Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley and JPMorgan posted record profits last year as a trading boom fuels a rebound for Wall Street banks in the country, the Financial Times reports. The recovery signals renewed momentum for foreign banks in Chinese capital markets after years of pullback.

title: Investors Looking for Shelter From AI Storm Are Turning to India
summary: After largely missing out on the global AI equity rally, Indian stocks are regaining investor attention as a refuge from mounting AI market turbulence, per Bloomberg. The rotation reflects growing caution around stretched AI-driven valuations elsewhere.

title: Banco del Bienestar aumenta su capital en 4,245 millones de pesos
summary: Banco del Bienestar incrementó su capital social en 4,245 millones de pesos, según Expansión. El resumen disponible no detalla el destino específico de los recursos ni el marco regulatorio de la operación.

title: Bancos evitarán fraudes con nueva regulación biométrica
summary: Una nueva regulación biométrica busca ayudar a los bancos en México a prevenir y reducir el fraude financiero, según Expansión. El resumen disponible de la nota no detalla aún el alcance específico ni el calendario de implementación de la norma.

title: ¿Por qué siguen creciendo los créditos hipotecarios aunque las tasas permanecen altas?
summary: Pese a que las tasas de interés se mantienen elevadas, el crédito hipotecario en México continúa expandiéndose, según Expansión. El resumen disponible no detalla más cifras, pero apunta a un crecimiento sostenido de la originación hipotecaria en un entorno de tasas altas.

title: Goldman Sachs ve oportunidades en América Latina tras mejorar su visión sobre emergentes
summary: Goldman Sachs adoptó una visión más constructiva sobre los mercados emergentes para la segunda mitad de 2026, impulsada por el alivio en los precios del petróleo, según Bloomberg Línea. El banco identifica oportunidades diferenciadas en renta variable, divisas y deuda para América Latina, aunque advierte riesgos ligados a la política monetaria de Estados Unidos.

title: Israeli AI Startup Eyes Expansion in Trump-Aligned Latin America
summary: An Israeli AI startup is betting that Trump-aligned election victories across Latin America will boost demand for its government-focused cybersecurity products, Bloomberg reports. The company is positioning to expand its regional footprint as political alignments in the region shift.

title: Big Tech Sends Workers Into the Field to Help Customers Use AI
summary: Microsoft and Amazon are following AI-native companies by building units of "forward-deployed" engineers who work directly with customers to help them adopt AI tools, per Bloomberg. The move reflects growing enterprise demand for hands-on implementation support, not just software licensing.

title: AI Productivity Hopes Show ‘Exuberance,’ Allianz’s Subran Says
summary: Allianz chief economist Ludovic Subran says AI productivity hopes reflect market "exuberance," arguing the technology's economic impact will likely be far less even across sectors and economies than current hype suggests, per Bloomberg.

title: Windsor: Market Has Mistaken Demand for AI Compute
summary: Semiconductor stocks suffered their worst two-day selloff in nearly a month after an 88% quarterly rally, with analyst Richard Windsor telling Bloomberg the market has overestimated near-term demand for AI compute. The pullback raises questions about how durable the AI infrastructure trade really is.
